tour_name: Places Parisians Love: Classic Treasures, Hidden Gems & Locals' Picks
review_text: I booked this tour not really knowing to expect given that I had been to Paris a few times before and done other walking tours. But this tour was a great little surprise - my guide was super knowledgeable and funny, it was a very pleasant experience despite the heavy rain on the day. I'd highly recommend it :)

tour_name: Places Parisians Love: Classic Treasures, Hidden Gems & Locals' Picks
review_text: We recently took a free walking tour of Paris’ hidden gems, and it was one of the best experiences we’ve had. Our guide was exceptionally knowledgeable and made the tour incredibly interesting and engaging. They shared a range of fascinating facts that went well beyond what you can find online. From quaint alleys to lesser-known historical and artistic sites, every stop was enriched by the guide’s insights and enthusiasm. Highly recommended for anyone looking to explore the unseen side of Paris! Definitely one of the best walking tours we’ve done.

tour_name: Paris Left Bank: Writers, Revolution & Black Coffee
review_text: Audrey made this tour the absolute best experience we have had of Paris so far! Her knowledge of architecture and culture is impressive, and her attitude is cordial. She showed us many interesting places like the Sorbonne and Notre-Dame, but also hidden gems like Saint Julian Church, medeival streets, and The Museum of Middle Ages. She answered all our questions and we forgot about the cold weather and enjoyed the experience. We recommend the tour wholeheartedly! Thank you, Audrey!

tour_name: Le Marais without the crowds, the beating heart of Paris
review_text: Wir haben heute eine Führung durch das Marais gemacht und waren begeistert. Unser Guide sprach ausgezeichnetes Englisch, erklärte komplexe historische Zusammenhänge klar, lebendig und mit viel Charme und Humor. Besonders beeindruckt hat uns sein enormes Wissen: Er beantwortete jede Frage fundiert, verständlich und mit spannenden zusätzlichen Details. Die Geschichte des Marais wurde nicht einfach nur erzählt, sondern so vermittelt, dass Menschen, Ereignisse und Orte lebendig wurden und lange in Erinnerung bleiben. Die Tour war gleichermaßen informativ, unterhaltsam und inspirierend. Wer das Marais wirklich verstehen und nicht nur besichtigen möchte, ist hier genau richtig. Eine der besten Stadtführungen, die wir je erlebt haben. Uneingeschränkte Empfehlung.

tour_name: Le Marais without the crowds, the beating heart of Paris

review_text: Philippe is an excellent guide for the Le Marais Tour! The majority of that tour was away from the crowded tourist areas while giving us a bigger picture of how the area used to be with his insightful and very often funny stories. The time flew and made for an enjoyable time. He also gave great recommendations including his favorite bakery. Merci beaucoup Philippe!
